title: eurybia horrida
intro: Eurybia horrida, also known as devil's hair or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eurybia horrida include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. Eurybia horrida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
